response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js credentials, but he does not meet the mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ experience amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015, far short of the 5–10 years required. C++ does not appear in his listed skills. There is no evidence of Windows-platform development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB is his primary database), and no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge. The brief stint at RIDE Capital involved Node.js and GraphQL work on a retail investment product, not capital-markets or fixed-income systems. His profile is misaligned with every mandatory requirement of this role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience demonstrating adaptability and strong fundamentals
Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps practices (GitLab, Docker, CI servers) relevant to modern delivery pipelines
Strong communication skills evidenced by public talks, multi-day workshops, and teaching engagements
concerns: Virtually no C++ experience — only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015, versus 5–10 years required
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is primarily MongoDB with only generic 'SQL' listed in skills
